title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: - `v8` の現状態は「完了停止」ではなく「選択待ち」です。`status: READY_FOR_SELECTION`、`selection_required: true`、`selected_variant: null`。 [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variant-matrix.json) - 2 variant の実体は揃っています。`structured_native=PASS`、`nanobanana_manus=PREVIEW_ONLY`。 [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variant-matrix.json) [structured-native delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/structured-native/delivery-gate.json) [nanobanana-manus delivery-gate.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variants/nanobanana-manus/delivery-gate.json) - パイプライン契約は「2本作成後に自動確定」ではなく「必ず selection_required で止める」実装です。`selection_required: true` を固定で書き、`selected_variant: null` で返します。 [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L563](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L563) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L570](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L570) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L571](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L571) - `PREVIEW_ONLY` を選択可能扱いにして `READY_FOR_SELECTION` に含める設計です（`PASS` と同列で selectable）。 [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L564](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L564) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L569](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L569) - `nanobanana` 側は editable PPTX 不在時に `PREVIEW_ONLY` にフォールし、manifest/HTML preview を成果物として残す契約です。 [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L542](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L542) [run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L545](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/run-slide-variant-matrix.js#L545) [slide SKILL.md:87](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/SKILL.md#L87) [agent.md:144](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/agents/agent.md#L144) - 真の残タスクは `selected_variant` の確定だけです。追加実装は不要。 [variant-matrix.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tmp/note-medical-ai-gcloud-slides-20260318-v8-manus-clean-env/delivery/variant-matrix.json)
